mapper.sql: g.id, g.title, g.price, g.`condition`, g.view_count AS viewCount, g.favorite_count AS favoriteCount, g.status, g.campus, g.trade_type AS tradeType, g.create_time AS createTime, u.id AS seller_id, u.nickname AS seller_nickname, u.avatar AS seller_avatar, (SELECT gi.image_url FROM goods_image gi WHERE gi.goods_id = g.id ORDER BY gi.sort_order LIMIT 1) AS coverImage
mapper.select: SELECT FROM goods g LEFT JOIN user u ON g.user_id = u.id WHERE g.deleted = 0 AND g.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY (g.view_count * 0.7 + g.favorite_count * 0.3) DESC, g.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT FROM goods g LEFT JOIN user u ON g.user_id = u.id WHERE g.deleted = 0 AND g.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY g.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT FROM favorite f INNER JOIN goods g ON f.goods_id = g.id AND g.deleted = 0 AND g.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN user u ON g.user_id = u.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT FROM goods g LEFT JOIN user u ON g.user_id = u.id WHERE g.id = #{id}
